title: A Hotel in Venezuela’s Capital Has Become the U.S. Embassy’s De Facto Headquarters
summary_full: The J.W. Marriott in Venezuela’s capital is suddenly awash in U.S. diplomats, spies and fortune seekers, showcasing changes in the country.
summary_public: The J.W. Marriott in Venezuela’s capital is suddenly awash in U.S. diplomats, spies and fortune seekers, showcasing changes in the country.
